Tournament Summary
Day 1 · Singles (Stableford)
Quinta do Lago
Pickup: 11:00 Airport (25mins to course)
Tees: 13:36 start
Return: 20:30 (20mins to hotel)
Nearest Pins: 8th (177 yds) & 12th (166 yds)
Longest Drive: 15th Par 5
Food: 12:00 @ Quinta do Lago Clubhouse

Vale do Lobo Royal

Tees: 11:00 start
Return: 18:00 (20mins to hotel)

Ombria

Dom Pedro Old Course
